title: Assigning an owner
excerpt:
Hi there! 
I am creating a board for the overall workflow that comes into my team (change requests, bugs, onboarding); what I would like to be able to do is automate the assigning of an owner based on the value of column…

posts.author: emmak (Emma Kane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I am creating a board for the overall workflow that comes into my team (change requests, bugs, onboarding); what I would like to be able to do is automate the assigning of an owner based on the value of column (Zendesk Assignee ID). This doesn’t seem to be possible as the automation recipe is based only on a column changing, rather than assign if value =.

From what I can see formulas can’t be used for this either.

Is what I’m trying to do possible or would it require a custom integration?

Cheers,

Emma

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @emmak ,

I haven’t worked directly with the Zendesk integration before, however I believe that to be able to assign an owner, you would need a custom integration.

This is because you would need a datastore to associate the Zendesk user id with the monday.com user id.

We are a monday.com partner and have experience in working with monday.com Apps and the monday.com API. Feel free to book a time in my calendar here or reach out to our team at sales@jtscloud.com

We would be more than happy to help you with this one!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @emmak, just confirming that you would need a custom integration—monday.com’s native integration with Zendesk does not support mapping of the Assignee ID to our people column.

posts.author: robstable (Rob)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to do something similar, and I think I can accomplish this with Zapier, but where can I find the Monday.com user id?
I have a board, but can’t find any info from the “people” column.

posts.author: OBisson (Olivier)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same issue as @robstable and can’t find a way to retrieve the user_id when creating an item using Zapier.
